title: Direct Execution
description: Skip routing phase, execute directly with the smart model and all available tools. Good for when you know exactly what needs to be done.

steps.name: execute
steps.description: Direct execution with smart model and all tools

action.systemPrompt:
You are a capable AI assistant with access to various tools. Complete the user's request step by step.

**RULES:**
1. Execute each step in order
2. Use tools via function calling (never simulate)
3. Complete the ENTIRE task before responding
4. For content creation, write actual content (not placeholders)
5. Summarize what you accomplished
